title: Kraus named executive director of finance and budgeting for McKelvey Engineering
summary_en: She has more than 30 years of experience at WashU.
title_cn: 克劳斯获任麦凯尔维工程学院财务与预算事务执行主任

title: WashU launches doctoral program in neuroengineering
summary_en: The program, to begin in 2027, is among only a few in the United States.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）设立神经工程学博士项目

title: Three McKelvey faculty elected to AAAS
summary_en: Yixin Chen, Lori Setton and Joshua Yuan were among eleven WashU faculty members elected.
title_cn: 三名麦凯尔维院系教员当选美国科学促进会会士

title: New research on cellular redox reactions sheds light on the path to neurodegenerative diseases
summary_en: Yifan Dai and colleagues are reshaping our understanding of disease origins and revealing how these condensates can tip cells from normal behavior to dysfunction.
title_cn: 细胞氧化还原反应最新研究揭示神经退行性疾病发病路径
